<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

This project is a Vite + React web app for a community event photo booth platform. Prioritize modern, colorful, and celebration-themed UI. Focus on user-friendly photo upload (camera/device) and gallery features.
